message: PR #104 accounts QA audit: fixed 15 findings. H2/M1 — single-source RU localization (service emits raw AccountStatus + RU relative time; UI _account_status_label is the only translation point; deleted English _status_label). H1 — UI sends username=None when unchanged (no USERNAME_NOT_MODIFIED). H3 — error snapshots no longer cached. M2 footer hides only on success; M3 story kind inferred from extension (dropdown removed); M4 delete errors translated; M5 search debounce; M6 uploader CSS scoped to .tb-profile-dialog. All gates green, +6 tests (543 pass).
